spec.description: Memcached dashboard for OpenTelemetry metrics with target-aware resource_creator labels.

spec.expr: clamp_max(count(count by (memcached_server, pod) (memcached_connections_current{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"})), 1)

spec.description: Synthetic status based on whether selected Memcached target series exist.
spec.title: Memcached Targets Active

spec.expr:
100 *
sum by (memcached_server, pod) (
  rate(memcached_operations_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id", operation="get", type="hit"}[$__rate_interval])
)
/
clamp_min(
  sum by (memcached_server, pod) (
    rate(memcached_operations_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id", operation="get", type="hit"}[$__rate_interval])
  )
  +
  sum by (memcached_server, pod) (
    rate(memcached_operations_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id", operation="get", type="miss"}[$__rate_interval])
  ),
  0.001
)

spec.description: Computed get hit ratio from memcached_operations_total hit/miss counters.
spec.title: Computed Get Hit Ratio by Pod

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod) (memcached_current_items{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"})

spec.description: Current number of key/value objects stored in each Memcached pod.
spec.title: Current Items by Pod

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod) (memcached_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"})

spec.description: Current Memcached memory usage in bytes by pod.
spec.title: Memory Bytes by Pod

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod, direction) (rate(memcached_network_by_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Memcached network throughput by pod and direction.
spec.title: Network I/O by Pod

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod, state) (rate(memcached_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: CPU seconds consumed per second by pod and CPU state.
spec.title: CPU Usage Rate by Pod

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod) (memcached_threads{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"})

spec.description: Current Memcached thread count by pod.
spec.title: Threads by Pod

spec.expr:
label_replace(sum by (namespace, pod, memcached_server, memcached_endpoint) (memcached_connections_current{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}), "metric", "Connections", "__name__", ".*")
or
label_replace(sum by (namespace, pod, memcached_server, memcached_endpoint) (memcached_current_items{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}), "metric", "Items", "__name__", ".*")
or
label_replace(sum by (namespace, pod, memcached_server, memcached_endpoint) (memcached_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}), "metric", "Memory Bytes", "__name__", ".*")
or
label_replace(sum by (namespace, pod, memcached_server, memcached_endpoint) (rate(memcached_evictions_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}[$__rate_interval])), "metric", "Eviction Rate", "__name__", ".*")
or
label_replace(avg by (namespace, pod, memcached_server, memcached_endpoint) (memcached_operation_hit_ratio_percent{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id", operation="get"}), "metric", "Get Hit Ratio", "__name__", ".*")

spec.description: Summary table grouped by real Memcached target labels. Uses one PromQL expression to avoid duplicate cluster/os columns from Grafana joins.
spec.title: Memcached Summary by Pod / Server

spec.expr: sum by (namespace, pod, memcached_server, operation, type) (rate(memcached_operations_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Operation throughput by pod, operation, and hit/miss type.
spec.title: Memcached Operations Breakdown

spec.description: Current open Memcached connections across selected pods.
spec.title: Total Current Connections

spec.description: Average OTel precomputed get hit ratio across selected Memcached pods.
spec.title: Average Get Hit Ratio

spec.description: Evictions per second. Sustained non-zero values usually indicate memory pressure.
spec.title: Total Eviction Rate

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod) (memcached_connections_current{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"})

spec.description: Current open Memcached connections grouped by real Memcached target.
spec.title: Current Connections by Pod

spec.description: New Memcached connections per second by pod.
spec.title: Connection Rate by Pod

spec.expr: sum by (memcached_server, pod, operation, type) (rate(memcached_operations_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Hit/miss operation throughput by pod, operation, and result type.
spec.title: Operation Rate by Result

spec.expr: avg by (memcached_server, pod, operation) (memcached_operation_hit_ratio_percent{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", memcached_server=~"$memcached_server", memcached_endpoint=~"$memcached_endpoint", container_id=~"$container_id"})

spec.description: OTel precomputed operation hit ratio grouped by Memcached target and operation.
spec.title: Hit Ratio by Operation and Pod
Memcached Details - OpenTelemetry Target Aware
